mapper.sql: USER_ID, USER_NAME, USER_PASS, ROLE_ID, ORG, BRANCH_ID, BANK_ID, MERCHANT, IS_AVAILABLE, INIT_PASS, ERROR_NUM, PASS_STATUS, LAST_PASS_UPDATE_TIME, SALT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3
mapper.update: update TBL_USER SET IS_AVAILABLE = 0 WHERE USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert: insert into TBL_USER (USER_ID, USER_NAME, USER_PASS, ROLE_ID, ORG, BRANCH_ID, BANK_ID, MERCHANT, IS_AVAILABLE, INIT_PASS, ERROR_NUM, PASS_STATUS, LAST_PASS_UPDATE_TIME, SALT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3 ) values (#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{branchId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{merchant,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{initPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{passStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastPassUpdateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{salt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into TBL_USER
USER_ID,
USER_NAME,
USER_PASS,
ROLE_ID,
ORG,
BRANCH_ID,
BANK_ID,
MERCHANT,
IS_AVAILABLE,
INIT_PASS,
ERROR_NUM,
PASS_STATUS,
LAST_PASS_UPDATE_TIME,
SALT,
CREATE_BY,
CREATE_TIME,
UPDATE_TIME,
UPDATE_BY,
RESERVED_FIELD1,
RESERVED_FIELD2,
RESERVED_FIELD3,

mapper.update:
update TBL_USER
USER_NAME = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USER_PASS = #{userPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ROLE_ID = #{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG = #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BRANCH_ID = #{branchId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BANK_ID = #{bankId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MERCHANT = #{merchant,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_AVAILABLE = #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
INIT_PASS = #{initPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ERROR_NUM = #{errorNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
PASS_STATUS = #{passStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_PASS_UPDATE_TIME = #{lastPassUpdateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
SALT = #{salt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATE_BY = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATE_TIME = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_BY = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update TBL_USER set USER_NAME = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_PASS = #{userPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ROLE_ID = #{roleId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG = #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BRANCH_ID = #{branchId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_ID = #{bankId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MERCHANT = #{merchant,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_AVAILABLE = #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INIT_PASS = #{initPass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ERROR_NUM = #{errorNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, PASS_STATUS = #{passStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_PASS_UPDATE_TIME = #{lastPassUpdateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, SALT = #{salt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREATE_BY = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREATE_TIME = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_BY = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
